<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\Metadata; /** * @immutable * * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ final readonly class TestWith extends Metadata { private mixed $data; /** * @var ?non-empty-string */ private ?string $name; /** * @param int<0, 1> $level * @param ?non-empty-string $name */ protected function __construct(int $level, mixed $data, ?string $name = null) { parent::__construct($level); $this->data = $data; $this->name = $name; } public function isTestWith(): true { return true; } public function data(): mixed { return $this->data; } /** * @phpstan-assert-if-true !null $this->name */ public function hasName(): bool { return $this->name !== null; } /** * @return ?non-empty-string */ public function name(): ?string { return $this->name; } }
